title: Neural Architectures for Edge Computing
description: Investigating lightweight neural networks that can run efficiently on low-power IoT devices like our SmartBins project, without sacrificing accuracy.

title: Quantum Algorithm Optimization
description: Developing novel error-correction algorithms for early-stage quantum processors to improve computational stability.

title: Distributed System Scalability
description: A new consensus mechanism designed to process over 100,000 requests per second on decentralized academic networks.

title: Advanced Image Recognition Pipelines
description: Training DenseNet and ResNet models using OpenCV and YOLO to improve real-time object detection in crowded environments.
